'''''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide''''' is a supplement for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] published by [[West End Games]]. It is a book that details the workings of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was written from the [[in-universe]] perspective of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]].

==Publisher's summary==
===Front cover===
'''Fantastic technology and new equipment to give the soldiers of the Rebel Alliance an edge in their struggle against the Evil Galactic Empire.'''

===Back cover===
'''Technology. Learn to use it or be used by it. In the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Empire has all of the advantages. More troops. More weapons. Better equipment. The Rebel Alliance has to rely on the resourcefulness of its troops and their ability to make do with what is at hand.'''

Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]], a decorated veteran of many battles, teaches Rebel soldiers how to survive in the field where the best weapon is one's wits. Cracken explains how to alter technology to the needs of the moment and increase the odds of survival despite cunning foes and hostile environments. The general provides complete information, much of it a secret, concerning new weapons and tools for Rebel troops and their foes.

==Contents==
===General [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]===
===Computers===
*[[MicroThrust Processors|MicroThrust]] Portable Computers
*Smuggling data in a blaster
*[[MicroThrust computer spike|MicroThrust Computer Spikes]]

===Equipment===
*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bio-hound|Bio hound]]
*[[BioTech Industries/Legends|BioTech Industries]] [[FastFlesh medpac/Legends|FastFlesh medpac]]
*[[Droid/Legends|Droid]] [[Restraining bolt/Legends|Restraining Bolt]]
*Deactivating Droid Retraining Bolts

===Jury-Rigging===
*[[Animal Restraining Bolt|Animal restraining bolt]] (ARB)
*False voice transmitter
*Holo-bit Generator
*Simple lock picker
*Defeating a [[Magnetic seal/Legends|magnetic seal]]

*Lectroticker
